---
title: "Kevin Fanning"
image: profile.png
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
    - icon: youtube
      text: YouTube
      href: https://youtube.com/@Xin_IronShark
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com

---

About the author

Eventually I would probably put my CV / Resume here

This to test pushing and not losing cname
